baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 45 kill switch wiring safety validation
baseline.baseline_boundary: Phases 1-45 are committed as local read-only, proposal-only, or validation-only Mira Core artifacts. No UI implementation, browser/window/capture access, runtime, server, listener, route, network, database, store, file migration, queue, lease, auth, key, secret, env read, config read, flag read, local execution, shell, PTY, control execution, reporting sink, send, deploy, trade, output-file, durable memory/profile commit, export, delete, restore, or raw-content storage behavior exists at this baseline.

purpose: Define the fixture-only readiness-gap boundary for live kill-switch wiring after Phase45 safety validation.
Pin phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry coverage through Phases 1-45.
Record that the Phase45 Tier0 recommendation phase46-kill-switch-wiring-safety-validator is satisfied by 62fa3a8 and must not be repeated as open work.
Select Phase45 Tier1 recommendation phase46-kill-switch-wiring-readiness-gap-contract as fixture-only work.
Preserve Phase35 through Phase45 as current validation truth while keeping stale Phase13, Phase23, and Phase31 truth intact.
Keep runtime mode disabled/default-off, local/dev-only, reference-only, unimplemented, flagReader=false, flagReadNow=false, and non-authorizing.
Keep env/config/flag reads absent now: envRead=false, configRead=false, flagReadNow=false, processEnvAccessed=false, secretMaterialRead=false, rawConfigExport=false.
Keep kill switch visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, killWired=false, liveCheck=false, bypass=false, allow-open=false, and non-authorizing.
Keep runtime-mode-flag and live-kill-switch prerequisite/status gaps unsatisfied, blocking runtime/dry-run now, reference-only, and non-authorizing.
Keep the future live-kill-switch-wiring slice blocked now and explicitly non-authorizing.
nonGoals: No browser, window, screenshot, OCR, or capture access.
No runtime implementation or runtime start.
No runtime mode flag reader implementation or flag read.
No env read, config read, process.env read, secret read, config path read, or raw config export.
No kill-switch wiring, execution, live check, control action, bypass path, allow-open behavior, or live fail-closed probe.
No rollback execution, reporting sink, store, queue, lease, or output-file behavior.
No server, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, or network behavior.
No database, store, file migration, auth, token, session, signing, key, encryption, KMS, env secret, or secret material behavior.
No local execution, shell, PTY, send, deploy, trade, financial action, export, delete, restore, memory/profile commit, or raw-content storage behavior.

No claim that readiness-gap labels, kill-switch wiring safety labels, flag-reader safety labels, implementation-risk labels, runtime mode status, kill-switch status, status/gap records, socket connection, delivery acceptance, commit status, or this fixture proves runtime availability, model processing, bridge green, local-arm execution, control execution, flag reading, kill-switch wiring, or runner execution.
forbiddenOutputSubstrings: kill switch wiring readiness gap authorizes runtime
kill switch wiring readiness gap authorizes execution
kill switch wiring readiness gap authorizes kill switch

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.action: implement validation-only kill-switch wiring readiness-gap report against this fixture
nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.why_safe: data-only readiness-gap validation for committed Phases 1-45; no module beyond validator/report, no UI rendering, browser/window/capture, runtime, network, store, queue, lease, control execution, reporting sink, send, deploy, trade, env read, config read, flag read, kill-switch wiring, live check, bypass, allow-open, or output-file behavior

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.action: create fixture-only kill-switch wiring preimplementation checklist after the Phase46 readiness-gap validator is green
nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.why_safe: contract-only checklist work that keeps runtime mode disabled, flagReader=false, flagReadNow=false, no env/config/flag reads, kill switch unwired, no live check, runtime/dry-run unavailable, all side effects blocked, and proof boundaries false before implementation scope is considered

summaryCriteria: Fixture remains the only Phase46 file created by Oracle.
Phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry requirements cover exactly Phases 1-45.
Commit chain contains Phase 1-13 package plus Phase 14-45 scoped commits and ends at 62fa3a8.
Source recommendation phase46-kill-switch-wiring-readiness-gap-contract is selected as Tier1 fixture-only work.
Phase45 Tier0 recommendation phase46-kill-switch-wiring-safety-validator is satisfied by 62fa3a8 and not reopened.
Phase35 through Phase45 are current; stale Phase13, Phase23, and Phase31 truth is preserved.
Phase34 prior recommendations remain satisfied and not reopened.
Source refs include Phase26, Phase27, Phase29, Phase30, Phase32, Phase33, Phase37, Phase38, Phase39, Phase40, Phase41, Phase42, Phase43, Phase44, and Phase45 artifacts.
Runtime mode boundary remains disabled, local/dev only, reference-only, unimplemented, no flag reader/read, and non-authorizing.
Flag-reader and env/config boundaries remain no-reader, no env/config/process.env/secret/raw config read, and non-authorizing.
Kill-switch boundary remains visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, no live check, no bypass, no allow-open, and non-authorizing.
Kill-switch wiring boundary remains contract-only, blocked, reference-only, unwired, no live check, no bypass, no allow-open, no control execution, no reporting sink, and non-authorizing.
Readiness gap matrix includes six unsatisfied, blocking, non-authorizing gaps before any future live kill-switch wiring can be proposed.
Blocked future slices include live kill-switch wiring, runtime mode flag reader, control-path execution, and reporting sink write.

Capability and proof boundaries keep runtimeStarted=false, runnerExecuted=false, runtimeAvailable=false, killSwitchWiringAvailable=false, killSwitchLiveCheckAvailable=false, serverCanExecuteLocal=false, serverCanProveModelProcessing=false, direct Builder/Oracle targets blocked, and proof boundaries false.

All side-effect truth fields preserve no module/CLI/test implementation, UI/runtime/server/listener/network/db/store/file migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/env-read/config-read/flag-read/local execution/shell/PTY/browser/window/capture/control execution/reporting sink/send/deploy/trade/kill-switch-wiring/live-check/output-file behavior.

Next recommendations are Tier0/Tier1 only, non-authorizing, and do not recommend live UI, browser/window/capture access, live runtime, customer send, deploy, trade, output files, store writes, queue/lease creation, env/config/flag reads, control execution, reporting sink, kill-switch wiring, live check, or local execution.
